title: Kitakami Midori new original character or mimic
display_title: Kitakami Midori new original character or mimic
wikitext:
[]: Kitakami Midori - new original character or mimic?             Quote Post by Newser » Wed Jul 24, 2013 10:02 am How do you think, could Midori be inspired by some character or be a reference to someone from any other anime? She looks just too picturesque for me to believe that she was created completely from zero SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 24, 2013 10:12 am I saw a theory that Midori was an homage to the character Gay Ellis from the 70's British SF series UFO : SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 24, 2013 10:42 am ElMariachi wrote: I saw a theory that Midori was an homage to the character Gay Ellis from the 70's British SF series UFO
